data.title: 国际服主线关卡开放：Area17
data.summary: [New Mission Available Notice] Check out Mission Area 17 in the 9/20 (Tue) update. New T6 Equipment
data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 17 in the 9/20 (Tue) update.
New T6 Equipment Blueprints in Normal Missions, and Karin’s Eleph in Hard Missions have been added as new rewards!
![nMt3TwYGHmQpoiCI2oLJwNRHhC3LiKgi.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/nMt3TwYGHmQpoiCI2oLJwNRHhC3LiKgi.jpg)
